testsuite.name: de.seuhd.ktfuzzer.mode.mutational.MutatorsTest

testcase.name: repeatRandomCharacter on a single character yields a run of that character()

failure.message: java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: Index 1 out of bounds for length 1

testcase.name: mutators never throw on arbitrary input()

failure.message:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Property failed after 3 attempts
Arg 0: <empty string> (shrunk from "=SXX4dPt0Pz8dUBlH(;h *7eS"2E)n0u {a*Vtk`Vf!(5"8ef#\l{j")

Caused by IllegalArgumentException: Random range is empty: [1, 0).

testcase.name: flipRandomCharacter changes exactly one character by a single bit()
the length-preserving mutators are no-ops on empty input()
testcase.failure: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Random range is empty: [1, 0). at kotlin.random.RandomKt.checkRangeBounds(Random.kt:385) at kotlin.random.Random.nextInt(Random.kt:67) at de.seuhd.ktfuzzer.mode.mutational.Mutators.deleteRandomCharacter(Mutators.kt:23) at de.seuhd.ktfuzzer.mode.mutational.MutatorsTest.the length-preserving mutators are no-ops on empty input(MutatorsTest.kt:61) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)

testcase.name: delete shrinks by one and insert grows by one on non-empty input()

testcase.name: insertRandomCharacter on empty input yields a single character()
insertRandomCharacter adds exactly one character from the alphabet()
flip preserves length on non-empty input()
repeatRandomCharacter grows the input()

failure.message: java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: Index 6 out of bounds for length 6

testcase.failure: java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: Index 6 out of bounds for length 6 at java.base/jdk.internal.util.Preconditions$1.apply(Preconditions.java:55) at java.base/jdk.internal.util.Preconditions$1.apply(Preconditions.java:52) at java.base/jdk.internal.util.Preconditions$4.apply(Preconditions.java:213) at java.base/jdk.internal.util.Preconditions$4.apply(Preconditions.java:210) at java.base/jdk.internal.util.Preconditions.outOfBounds(Preconditions.java:98) at java.base/jdk.internal.util.Preconditions.outOfBoundsCheckIndex(Preconditions.java:106) at java.base/jdk.internal.util.Preconditions.checkIndex(Preconditions.java:302) at java.base/java.lang.String.checkIndex(String.java:4904) at java.base/java.lang.StringLatin1.charAt(StringLatin1.java:45) at java.base/java.lang.String.charAt(String.java:1624) at de.seuhd.ktfuzzer.mode.mutational.Mutators.repeatRandomCharacter(Mutators.kt:78) at de.seuhd.ktfuzzer.mode.mutational.MutatorsTest.repeatRandomCharacter grows the input(MutatorsTest.kt:27) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)
